- Merged box (c, id=1): row 24-31, col 28-31, with 2 blue squares (id=2 and id=8) inside
- Left box (c, id=3): row 28-31, col 16-19, with blue square (id=7) inside

- White strip (W, id=6): row 28-31, col 39
- Blue square (b, id=10): row 31, col 32-35 - another blue square at the bottom of the blue bar area
So the blue bar split into two separate blue squares (id=4 and id=10) when the player moved through it. The player is now at col 36-38, and the white strip is at col 39.
This is interesting. The blue bar seems to break apart when the player interacts with it. Maybe the goal is to collect all the blue squares?
Let me think about this differently. I have:
- 2 blue squares in the merged box
- 1 blue square in the left box
- 2 blue squares that were part of the blue bar
Total: 5 blue squares
Maybe the goal is to get all blue squares into one container? Or maybe the goal is to move all blue squares to specific locations?
Let me try moving RIGHT again to see if the white strip follows.
